unsaved_changes_text:
The document has unsaved changes.
Save before continuing?
about_text:
Specialized Text Editor

GUI for language processor
Python + PyQt6

igor231223
2026
help_features:
• Create, open and save text files
• UTF-8 encoding support
• Syntax highlighting (Consolas)
• Customizable tabulation
help_hotkeys:
• Ctrl+N - New file
• Ctrl+O - Open file
• Ctrl+S - Save
• Ctrl+Shift+S - Save as
• Ctrl+Z - Undo
• Ctrl+Y - Redo
• Ctrl+X - Cut
• Ctrl+C - Copy
• Ctrl+V - Paste
• Ctrl+A - Select all
• F5 - Run analysis
• F1 - Help
help_analysis:
The program performs basic analysis of entered text:
• Empty text check
• Character count
• Words count
• Lines count
• Statistics output to bottom panel
help_i18n:
• Russian and English language support
• Automatic interface update when switching language
help_interface:
• Dual-panel interface (editor + output)
• Adjustable panel sizes
• Toolbar with icons
• Tooltips for all buttons
• Modern style with hover effects
help_additional:
• Unsaved changes warning
• File status display in title
• Panel splitter drag support
help_technical:
• Written in Python using PyQt6
• Modular architecture
• Easily extensible functionality
• Cross-platform compatibility
analysis_hint: 💡 Enter text in the top panel and press F5 or ▶️ button
